dungeon: (MULTI-DUNGEON STREAM, player 'Schmutz') ROTF green-forest realm + Elven dungeon + a red/magenta Shade-of-Novus zone — PLUS major SYSTEMS recovery (Haste stat, fruit stat-pots, marketplace)
source: gameplay video disc_iBUg7V_Eq0A (1025 frames, 27 transitions, player Schmutz 'Devil of Vyaden'). Transitions are mostly the GREEN-FOREST realm (giant brown tree-trunks + blue water lakes); chat captured boss taunts + the SERVER stat-consumable feed (verbatim).
map: DOCUMENTED biomes: a GREEN FOREST realm/hub (large vertical tree-trunk pillars + blue water lakes); an orange/tan dungeon; and a striking RED/MAGENTA shadow zone (pink/red tiles, a pink boss structure) = the Shade-of-Novus area. New-Character class-select screens also seen.

bosses.name: Infused Elven King
taunts: Finally my true power has been unleashed
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED VERBATIM (boss-colored chat line). 'Infused' = empowered/epic variant of the Elven King. Fought in the green Elven forest; death-feed shows 'crushed by Elven Captain!' (a minion/lieutenant).

bosses.name: TN Shade of Novus
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED VERBATIM. In the red/magenta zone. 'TN' prefix (Twilight-Necropolis variant?). Player note: 'this is shadow novus, the actual one looks different' => Shade of Novus has VARIANTS. Death-feed: 'crushed by TN Shade of Novus!' and 'crushed by Corrupted Archer S[tatue]!'.

bosses.name: Hunter (boss w/ counter)
bosses.note: Seen on the contact sheet with an HP bar + a '0/0/038'-style counter. Name 'Hunter <N>'. Not fully captured.

mechanics:
MAJOR SYSTEMS RECOVERY (all DOCUMENTED VERBATIM from the [Server] feed):
- HASTE STAT IS REAL + raised by a consumable: '[Server] Haste Orange consumed. 296 more to max.' (Haste = the documented ROTF cooldown-reduction stat; aced_RunesSkillTree).
- ROTF STAT-POTS ARE FRUIT-NAMED PER STAT, each with an 'N more to max' CAP: 'Attack Blackberry' (Attack), 'Defense Coconut' (Defense), 'Wisdom Elderberry' (Wisdom), 'Haste Orange' (Haste). (So stat consumables replace vanilla 'Potion of X' with <Stat> <Fruit/Color> items; Haste-Orange color = the Impact-rune orange.)
- MARKETPLACE CONFIRMED in-game: player line 'market place looks dope' (validates the Marketplace feature).
- A boss-fight mechanic 'the INCENSE': 'STOP RUNNING AWAY FROM THE INCENSE' (players must stay near/avoid an incense zone during a fight).
- 'white star' rank referenced (max-fame/star tier).
uncertain: Fruit names for the remaining stats (HP/MP/Dexterity/Speed/Vitality) not all captured — only Attack=Blackberry, Defense=Coconut, Wisdom=Elderberry, Haste=Orange seen. Boss attack patterns/HP/drops not isolated. 'Hunter' boss counter format unclear. Which exact dungeon the Elven forest is (Forbidden Jungle vs a new Elven dungeon) unconfirmed.
confidence: HIGH for the systems recovery (Haste stat + Haste Orange + fruit stat-pots + 'N more to max' caps + marketplace + incense mechanic — all verbatim) and the Infused-Elven-King / TN-Shade-of-Novus taunts (verbatim). MEDIUM for biome->dungeon mapping.
